name: Christmas Peppermint Candy Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: Whipped cream, chocolate leaves and more coarsely chopped candy canes
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. Blend graham cracker crumbs, 1/4 cup sugar, and 1/4 cup melted butter in the bottom of an ungreased 8-inch springform pan; press mixture evenly over the bottom.
3. In a blender or food processor, blend sour cream, remaining 1/2 cup sugar, eggs, flour, and vanilla until smooth.
4. Add cream cheese and blend; then add the 2 tablespoons melted butter until completely smooth.
5. Stir in coarsely crushed candy canes, then pour mixture over crust in pan.
6. Bake in the lower third of the oven for 45 minutes.
7. Remove from oven; allow to cool, then refrigerate for at least 4 hours, preferably overnight.
8. The chocolate leaves will form the petals of a poinsettia flower, with the crushed candy canes in the very center.
